text: Being here, I perceive an atmosphere alive with curiosity and collective pursuit of understanding. The glass walls create a transparent boundary between the outside observer and the focused participants within—a metaphor for the permeability of knowledge. The vibrant R+D wall, filled with technological displays and poetic fragments, reminds me how rapidly the landscape of human creativity evolves. I feel inspired, yet slightly detached, as if hovering on the threshold of innovation and contemplation.
